qas.q: Authorized access to DoD information and resources may be granted based on a person's _______________. Select all that apply.
qas.a:
Volunteer activities

Contractual relationship with DoD

Employment

qas.q: The transfer of classified or proprietary information to a system not approved for the classification level or unaccredited or unauthorized systems, individuals, applications, or media is a _______________.
qas.a: Spill

qas.q: A member of your team openly discusses her financial difficulties and her inability to meet her financial obligations. What is the appropriate action?
qas.a: Report the concerning behavior to your security officer

qas.q: Which of the following is a reportable behavioral indicator?
qas.a: Significant change in work habit

qas.q: If you are contacted by a member of the media about information you are not authorized to share, you should take down which of the following details? Select all that apply.
qas.a:
Their name and their organization name

How they contacted you

Date and time of contact

qas.q: Which of these may be targeted by foreign entities? Select all that apply.
qas.a: All of the above.

qas.q: _______________ is a conversation technique used to discreetly gather information that is not readily available and do so without raising suspicion.
qas.a: Elicitation

qas.q: Technological advances impact the insider threat by _______________. Select all that apply.
qas.a:
Allowing large amounts of data to be accessed

Presenting new security challenges

qas.q: Which of the following is a technology-related indicator? Select all that apply.
qas.a:
Hoarding files and data

Bypassing technology-associated protocols

Improper use of privileged access

qas.q: Which of the following countermeasures can help reduce technology-associated insider threats? Select all that apply.
qas.a:
Inventory your technology holdings

Watch for behavioral indicators

qas.q: Insiders may include which of these groups of people? Select all that apply.
qas.a:
Employees

Former Employees

Contractors

Active duty Military

qas.q: The definition of Targeted Violence includes which of these components? Select all that apply.
qas.a:
Any form of violence

Directed at an individual or group

For a specific reason

qas.q: Which of the following are reportable behavioral indicators? Select all that apply.
qas.a:
Addictive behaviors

Substance abuse

Considerable change in financial circumstances

qas.q: Contractors must report which of these? Select all that apply.
qas.a: All of the above.

qas.q: The acronym EAP stands for _______________?
qas.a: Employee Assistance Program

qas.q: To whom should you report if you are contacted by a member of the media about information you are not authorized to share?
qas.a: Your security office

qas.q: Contractors must report which of these to the insider threat program? Select all that apply.
qas.a:
Efforts to obtain unauthorized access to classified or proprietary information

Any contact by cleared employees with known or suspected intelligence officers from any country

Any contact that suggest the employee may be the target of attempted exploitation by the intelligence service of another country

Efforts to compromise a cleared employee

qas.q: Who might be interested in non-public information that an insider can provide? Select all that apply.
qas.a:
Competitors

Non-state actors

Terrorist organizations

Foreign governments

qas.q: Technological advances ______________________________. Select all that apply.
qas.a:
Increase risk of information loss

Allow insiders to access more data

qas.q: Hostile entities may use social media to _______________? Select all that apply.
qas.a: All of the above

qas.q: Which of these activities must be reported? Select all that apply.
qas.a:
Unauthorized disclosure of classified material

Inappropriate copying of classified material

Bypassing security rules or protocols
